song.title: We Are Hungry
song.lyrics:
[V1] Lord, I want more of You Living water rain down on me Lord, I need more of You Living breath of life come fill me up (repeat)
[C] We are hungry, We are hungry We are hungry for more of You We are thirsty, Oh Jesus We are thirsty for more of You
[B] We lift our holy hands up We want to touch You We lift our voices, higher and higher and higher to You
